sentiment.reasoning: The launch of a new product platform provides a clear catalyst for revenue growth and market positioning.

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences secures $650M contract with a national infrastructure agency

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
